description_long: This object consists of a matching pair of classic wooden nightstands, each featuring a rectangular tabletop with a slightly raised edge. Both nightstands have a single central drawer with a round knob handle, and an open lower shelf for additional storage. The legs are turned and tapered, giving the nightstands a traditional, elegant appearance. The wood grain is visible throughout, with a warm, medium-brown finish that highlights the natural texture. The overall construction appears sturdy, with smooth surfaces and well-defined edges. These nightstands are designed to complement bedroom or living room settings, providing both storage and display surfaces.
description: A pair of classic wooden nightstands with single drawers, open lower shelves, and turned tapered legs in a warm brown finish.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing both nightstands' drawers, knob handles, and open lower shelves.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the nightstands and the profile of the legs and shelves.
description_view_2: Rear angled view similar to the front, but with less visibility of the drawer handles.
description_view_3: Direct rear view showing the back panels and the open lower shelves.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
